name: PSA FOR CHATTING
description:
If youre persona states your height, it will mess up the bot and view you as your stated height, not the scenario height.

If you can, try editing your size out or making a new persona made for these scenarios.


Might not fix the problem completely but it will solve some of it.

And believe me, I state {{char}}'s sizes and {{user}}'s sizes repeatedly in the personality so IT SHOULD KNOW its correct size.


I hope this helps and I will try to see if I can figure another solution out too.
creator: Giants and More
